notes: Label uses the prohibited literal abbreviation 'ABV' (27 CFR 5.65(b) for spirits — accepts 'Alc. by Vol.' / 'Alc./Vol.' / 'ALC. BY VOL.' but not 'ABV'). Numeric value matches the application; the FAIL is purely the abbreviation form. The verifier's word-boundary regex catches this; the prompt has the model extract `alcohol_content_text` verbatim so the verifier sees the exact label string.
